colors.implementation_notes: Convert the hex colors to HSL in index.css to maintain compatibility with shadcn/ui. Map primary to td_green. Use card_bg and sidebar_bg appropriately in dark mode. For light mode, invert accordingly (e.g. background to white/slate-50).

typography.anti_pattern_avoidance: Use aggressive tracking (tracking-tight) for headings. Never center-align forms or dense content. Left-align for readability.

layout_spacing.grid_system: The Control Room Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4) with gap-4 or gap-6 for high data density.
layout_spacing.container_padding: p-6 or p-8 for cards to provide breathing room.
layout_spacing.alignment: Strict left-alignment for forms and data tables. Widgets stretch to match neighbors (h-full).

surfaces_micro_themes.cards: Neumorphic/Tactile variant. Flat background (card-bg in dark mode, white in light mode), 1px subtle border (border-border), no heavy drop shadows in dark mode. In light mode, subtle ambient shadow (shadow-sm).
surfaces_micro_themes.header: Solid background with a 1px bottom border (border-border). No glassmorphism as it's an enterprise data tool.
surfaces_micro_themes.sidebar: Dark mode: solid #0D1F14. Light mode: solid #EEF7F2. Right border 1px solid border/10.

components.buttons: Shadcn standard. Primary uses td-green (#007A33). High contrast text on hover. Include data-testid.
components.tables: TanStack Table. Use pagination, sticky headers, subtle row hover states. Empty states must have next-action CTAs.
components.editor: Monaco Editor with vs-dark theme in dark mode, vs-light in light mode. Used for code diffs in Regression Optimization and Tosca Conversion.
components.charts: Recharts. Use accessible colors (td-green, td-mid) with transparent tooltips.
components.forms: Shadcn forms with React Hook Form. Strict left alignment, generous spacing between fields.
components.badges: Job statuses use varied background tints (e.g., green-900/50 text-green-400 for success, red-900/50 text-red-400 for failure in dark mode).

interactions_motion.hover_states: All interactive elements must change background or text color slightly on hover.
interactions_motion.focus_states: ring-2 ring-primary/50 ring-offset-background for keyboard accessibility.
interactions_motion.sse_streaming: Chatbot right panel uses typewriter effect or smooth opacity fade for incoming text.
interactions_motion.transitions: transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out for buttons and cards.

media_assets.icons: lucide-react. Use ShieldCheck, Activity, TerminalSquare, Layers, LineChart for module icons.

images.description: Abstract green matrix code background for the login page right side split panel.

media_assets.logos: Use a text logo 'QGenie 2.0' with a lucide-react 'ShieldCheck' icon next to it colored in td-green. Do not use generic unsplash images for logos.

testing_accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY on all interactive and key elements (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='sidebar-tosca-link').
testing_accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over card-bg and sidebar-bg meets 4.5:1 ratio.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Zustand store for dark/light mode toggle, demo data toggle, and user auth state. Add dark/light toggle and demo data toggle in Topbar.
2. Implement the fixed layout: Left Sidebar (240px), Topbar (56px), Right Chatbot Panel (380px). Ensure the main scrollable content area sits between the sidebar and right panel, below the topbar.
3. Update tailwind.config.js and index.css with TD Bank HSL color variables.
4. For routing, set up React Router with layout wrapper for /projects and nested module routes (e.g. /projects/:id/tosca).
5. Use Monaco Editor for code/diff views in Tosca Conversion and Regression modules.
6. Integrate TanStack Table for data grids across all modules (test cases, RCA failures).
7. Implement right-side chatbot persistent panel with a mock SSE streaming response mechanism (setTimeout/setInterval) when user submits a query.
8. Ensure all forms use Shadcn components. Override tablist height if needed (h-auto).
9. Add data-testid attributes to all buttons, links, and major interactive widgets.
10. Only use Inter font. Apply tracking-tight to headings.
